all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And when all the people saw it, they fell on their faces: and they said, The Lord, he is the God; the Lord, he is the God.
1 Kings 18:39
Quote of the Day
"Only Jesus Christ can fully restore … light and joy into your life."
Elder Clark G. Gilbert | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
